### Post by kurtkraut on 2005-10-22
I intend to do a Install Party with Ubuntu. We (crew) are planning to wear a Ubuntu T-Shirt and I need the Ubuntu logo ([www.cereli.org/multimedia/images/distrib/ubuntu/UbuntuLogoSn.png](www.cereli.org/multimedia/images/distrib/ubuntu/UbuntuLogoSn.png)) together with the name Ubuntu, to make a T-shirt like [http://jitcrunch.cafepress.com/jitcrunch.aspx?](http://jitcrunch.cafepress.com/jitcrunch.aspx?)

If anyone could please send a link of this image I would be glad. If possible, in a big size so I can resize it as I might need.


Thanks

---

### Post by matthew on 2005-10-22
